action.reasoning: Observation: iter_26 test showed down1-4.conv.residual keys missing from checkpoints. Current model.py defines DoubleConvResidual in DownBlock, causing mismatch. Analysis: checkpoints have residual in inc and up blocks, but NOT in down blocks. We need to modify model.py to use DoubleConv (no residual) for down blocks. This should make loading work for all ensemble checkpoints, potentially recovering the 426.9984 ensemble and even improving with more members. Time remaining ~16 min, 3 iterations. Decision: rewrite model.py with DoubleConv (no residual) for down blocks, DoubleConvResidual for inc/up; create test script to verify loading of all 10 ensemble checkpoints; run test (no eval). Next iteration will submit eval if loading successful.
